evals.prompt: Run a web quality audit on our Next.js e-commerce site. Check Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS), Lighthouse performance score, bundle size, image optimization, and accessibility score. The site takes 4 seconds to load on 3G.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive audit with CWV measurements, bundle analysis, image optimization recommendations, and actionable fixes

assertions.name: core_web_vitals
assertions.description: Reports LCP, FID/INP, CLS with actual values and thresholds

assertions.name: lighthouse_scores
assertions.description: Performance, accessibility, best practices, SEO scores

assertions.name: bundle_analysis
assertions.description: Identifies large JavaScript bundles and suggests code splitting

assertions.name: image_optimization
assertions.description: Flags unoptimized images with specific recommendations

assertions.name: actionable_fixes
assertions.description: Each issue traces to a specific resource or code path, not just scores

evals.prompt: Our LCP is 3.8 seconds (should be under 2.5s). The hero image is 2.4MB, loaded from an external CDN, and the page has 800KB of JavaScript that blocks rendering. Help fix it.
evals.expected_output: Specific fixes for LCP: image optimization, JS deferral, preconnect hints, and priority loading

assertions.name: image_optimization
assertions.description: Recommends compressing hero image (WebP/AVIF, responsive sizes)

assertions.name: js_splitting
assertions.description: Recommends code splitting or lazy loading for non-critical JS

assertions.name: preconnect
assertions.description: Suggests preconnect to external CDN domain

assertions.name: priority_loading
assertions.description: Recommends priority/fetchpriority on LCP image

assertions.name: no_lazy_on_hero
assertions.description: Explicitly warns against loading=lazy on the hero/LCP image

evals.prompt: Set up performance budgets for our React app. We want: total JS under 300KB gzip, total CSS under 50KB, LCP under 2.5s, CLS under 0.1. Configure budgets that fail CI if exceeded.
evals.expected_output: Performance budget configuration with CI integration and specific resource limits

assertions.name: js_budget
assertions.description: JavaScript budget set at 300KB gzip

assertions.name: css_budget
assertions.description: CSS budget set at 50KB

assertions.name: cwv_budgets
assertions.description: LCP and CLS thresholds configured

assertions.name: ci_integration
assertions.description: Budgets enforced in CI pipeline (fail build if exceeded)

assertions.name: measurement_tool
assertions.description: Specific tool for measuring (bundlesize, Lighthouse CI, webpack-bundle-analyzer)

evals.prompt: Our CLS score is 0.35 (should be under 0.1). The main culprits seem to be: images without width/height, a banner that loads after page paint, and web fonts that cause text reflow. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: CLS fixes: explicit image dimensions, reserved space for banners, font-display swap

assertions.name: image_dimensions
assertions.description: Recommends explicit width/height or aspect-ratio on images

assertions.name: banner_space
assertions.description: Recommends reserving space for dynamically loaded banner (min-height)

assertions.name: font_display
assertions.description: Recommends font-display: swap or optional to prevent text reflow

assertions.name: before_after
assertions.description: Estimates CLS improvement from each fix

assertions.name: next_image
assertions.description: Recommends next/image which handles dimensions automatically

evals.prompt: Audit the SEO quality of our marketing site. Check: meta tags, structured data, sitemap, robots.txt, canonical URLs, Open Graph tags, and mobile-friendliness. The site is built with Next.js.
evals.expected_output: SEO audit covering technical SEO, meta tags, structured data, and social sharing

assertions.name: meta_tags
assertions.description: Checks title, description, viewport meta tags on key pages

assertions.name: structured_data
assertions.description: Checks for JSON-LD structured data (Organization, Product, FAQ)

assertions.name: sitemap
assertions.description: Checks for sitemap.xml with all public pages

assertions.name: robots_txt
assertions.description: Checks robots.txt allows crawling of important pages

assertions.name: open_graph
assertions.description: Checks OG tags for social sharing (title, description, image)
